CVE-2022-40898.title: An issue discovered in Python Packaging Authority (PyPA) Wheel 0. ...
CVE-2022-40898.summary: An issue discovered in Python Packaging Authority (PyPA) Wheel 0.37.1 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via attacker controlled input to wheel cli.
